nasb.text: When you bring in the grain offering which is made of these things to the Lord, it shall be presented to the priest and he shall bring it to the altar.

esv.text: And you shall bring the grain offering that is made of these things to the Lord, and when it is presented to the priest, he shall bring it to the altar.

cnv.text: 你要把這些東西做好，作獻給耶和華的素祭，奉給祭司，讓他帶到祭壇。

ccb.text: “要把做好的素祭带到耶和华面前，交给祭司献在祭坛上。
